title: St. Mary's Basilica
tagline: St. Mary's Basilica — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: St. Mary's Basilica is a much-loved spiritual town in Tamil Nadu, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Mary's Basilica is a church dedicated to Our Lady of the Nativity in Mulagumoodu, Tamil Nadu, India. It is the seventh basilica in the state of Tamil Nadu and the first in Kanyakumari district. The celebrations from 6 to 15 September every year are very popular.

topPlaces.name: Mulagumudu
topPlaces.description: Mulagumoodu is a town panchayat in Kanniyakumari district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Mulagumoodu comes under Kalculam taluk, Thuckalay block and Mulagumoodu town panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Vellicode
topPlaces.description: Vellicode is a village located in Kanyakumari District of Tamil Nadu, India on National Highway 47 approximately 47 km south of Trivandrum. Vellicode is a village which lies on the Trivandrum Kanyakumari Highway.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvithamcode
topPlaces.description: Thiruvithamcode (also spelled Thiruvithancode), is a small panchayat town located in the Kanyakumari district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Thiruvithamcode is about 20 km from Nagercoil and 2 km from Thuckalay.

topPlaces.name: Mekkamandapam
topPlaces.description: Mekkamandapam is a small village in the Kanyakumari district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Mekkamandapam which is situated in the state highway Colachel to Kulasekaram.

topPlaces.name: Valvaithankoshtam
topPlaces.description: Valvaithankoshtam is a panchayat town in Kanniyakumari district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Kappiyarai
topPlaces.description: Kappiyarai is a panchayat town in Kanniyakumari district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Vattavilai
topPlaces.description: Vattavilai is a fertile village, situated in the southern part of Vilavancode taluk of the Kanyakumari District of Tamil Nadu State. Some of the neighbouring villages of Vattavilai are Kottavilai, Ooralivilai, Maruthancode, etc.

topPlaces.name: Verkilambi
topPlaces.description: Verkilambi is an interior rural area the district of Kanyakumari at the state of Tamil Nadu. This is a grade – I Town panchayat spread in a total area of 15.7 Sq.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Mary's Basilica?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Mary's Basilica is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Mary's Basilica?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (47 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (45 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Mary's Basilica?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Mary's Basilica at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Mary's Basilica?
faq.a: Stays in St. Mary's Basilica start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Mary's Basilica?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mulagumudu, Vellicode, Thiruvithamcode, Mekkamandapam, Valvaithankoshtam.
